flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at James Sprunt Community College are 13% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($29.3k vs $33.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at James Sprunt Community College fell 27% between 2006 and 2009 (39.8% → 29.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at James Sprunt Community College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 799).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at James Sprunt Community College rose 295% between 2021 and 2024 (19.4% → 76.8%).
